title: lantana aristata f. brachypoda
intro: Lantana aristata f. brachypoda is a lesser-known variety of the Lantana plant, characterized by its compact growth and small, fragrant flowers. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lantana aristata f. brachypoda include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
